name: meter panel cropped dial
description:
Caution: In our downstream cls task, we have divided the numbers into 20 categories {0, 1,..., 8, 9, 0-1, 1-2,..., 8-9, 9-0} instead of the conventional 10 categories {0, 1,..., 9}. 
Therefore, there may be a situation where the bounding box annotation for a number includes two numbers within it.
The purpose of this design is to more accurately detect the situation where a certain digit on the roulette wheel rolls to the middle position (for example, 9-0, which is semantically similar to 9.5).
